title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 64.477 - Department of health and senior services to promulgate rules and regulations — inspection of licensed areas
text:
64.477.  Department of health and senior services to promulgate rules and regulations — inspection of licensed areas. — The state department of health and senior services shall prepare and publish rules and regulations which shall contain sanitary standards for disposal areas.  The department of health and senior services shall inspect all licensed disposal areas and enforce all provisions of sections 64.460 to 64.487.
(L. 1955 p. 348 § 6)
